Class OpenApi20DocumentImpl

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.NodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.RootNodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.openapi.v2x.v20.OpenApi20DocumentImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Document, Extensible, Node, OpenApiDocument, OpenApiExtensible, OpenApiSecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApi2xDocument, OpenApi2xExtensible, OpenApi2xSecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApi20Document, OpenApi20Extensible, OpenApi20SecurityRequirementsParent, RootNode, SecurityRequirementsParent, Visitable
public class OpenApi20DocumentImpl extends RootNodeImpl implements OpenApi20Document
